reason.description: So I introduced NothingType, but from what I can tell we're not using this anywhere? This is solely for the benefit of third parties annotating their code to accept NOTHING?

 NOTHING = _Nothing.NOTHING
 """
 Sentinel to indicate the lack of a value when `None` is ambiguous.
+
+When using in 3rd party code, use `attrs.NothingType` for type annotations.
 """
